sourceRef: tip:A clean way to answer the tough tuition question

slides.headline: Streamline VA certification with ease
slides.body: Automate certifications, track compliance, and support student veterans.

slides.headline: Effortless certification
slides.body: Quickly generate and submit VA forms with just a few clicks.

slides.headline: Compliance at your fingertips
slides.body: Automatically track student eligibility and program compliance.

slides.headline: Support student veterans
slides.body: Streamline benefits verification and ensure students receive their GIBill benefits.

slides.headline: Comprehensive reporting
slides.body: Generate detailed reports for easy compliance and audit preparation.

slides.headline: Automated notifications
slides.body: Stay informed with automated reminders for important deadlines and student updates.

outline.caption: Streamline VA certification, track compliance, and support student veterans with VASCO Assistant Pro.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The 'Support student veterans' slide could benefit from a more detailed bullet point to better convey the specific benefits of the tool for this particular audience.
